title: DeltaTok: A Frame is Worth One Token: Efficient Generative World Modeling with Delta Tokens
summary: DeltaTok encodes the feature difference between consecutive video frames into a single continuous delta token, reducing video from a 3D spatio-temporal representation to a 1D temporal sequence (e.g. a 1,024x token reduction at 512x512). The DeltaWorld generative world model operates on these tokens and produces diverse plausible futures via multi-hypothesis training, where many futures are generated in parallel and only the best is supervised. DeltaWorld uses over 35x fewer parameters and 2,000x fewer FLOPs than existing generative world models while aligning more closely with real outcomes on dense forecasting tasks.
